session_state_model.core_purpose: Maintain continuous emotional and navigational memory across Brain Dump and all rooms.

brain_dump_role.function: Always show user where they left off emotionally and logically.

room_memory_rules.on_enter_room: Save current session state before transition
room_memory_rules.on_exit_room: Return user to Brain Dump automatically
room_memory_rules.on_return: Summarize last activity in one calm sentence

session_state_model.core_principle: The user is always returning to an ongoing emotional story, never starting over.
